_comment: Curated explanations for notable changes in RBI's published data. Each entry matches on (bank, period, metric). If bank is omitted, applies to any bank; if metric is '*', applies to any metric. Charts overlay an amber marker at matching points with this text on hover.

annotations.title: Off-site reclassification (Oct 2018)
annotations.detail: AU SFB began reporting ~130 ATMs as off-site (had been 2 in Sep 2018). On-site stayed flat — looks like a one-time reclassification at source. RBI's published file matches this value.

annotations.title: Off-site reclassification (Dec 2019)
annotations.detail: AU SFB's off-site dropped from 265 → 3. On-site only rose by 4 — about 260 ATMs disappeared from the count. RBI's published file matches this; treat as a source-side reclassification.

annotations.title: Micro ATM portfolio reduction
annotations.detail: SBM India's Micro ATM count fell from 61,881 to 4,305 in Sep 2023. Likely a portfolio divestment; RBI source data matches.

annotations.title: COVID-19 lockdown (Apr 2020)
annotations.detail: India's national lockdown began Mar 25, 2020 and continued through April. ATM cash-withdrawal volumes and values dropped sharply across all banks. Real economic event.

annotations.title: Demonetisation aftermath (Dec 2016)
annotations.detail: ₹500 and ₹1000 notes were demonetised on Nov 8, 2016. Withdrawal patterns swung dramatically as new currency was distributed; expect outsized moves Nov-2016 through Feb-2017.
